user.title: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
user.description: Create one organized controller device for every physical TV, Chromecast, Cast speaker, or smart display. After setup, open Configure to merge native entities that represent the same physical device.

abort.already_configured: Cast Metadata & TV Controls is already configured.

init.title: Controller configuration
init.description: First review physical-device merging, then configure capability routing, applications, activities, timing, and Wake-on-LAN.

menu_options.add_group: Merge representations of the same physical device

add_group.title: Merge representations of the same physical device
add_group.description: Select every native media_player entity that belongs to one physical television. For example, select its Sony BRAVIA, MediaRenderer, Android TV Remote, ADB, and built-in Cast entities together. Do not select the Controller entity created by this integration. Saving reloads the integration and consolidates the duplicate devices.

remove_group.title: Unmerge a manually grouped device
remove_group.description: Remove a manual merge and return these source entities to automatic physical-device matching.

clear_groups.title: Remove all manual device merges
clear_groups.description: All source entities will return to automatic physical-device matching after the integration reloads.

configure_routes.title: Route controller capabilities
configure_routes.description: Choose the physical controller to configure.

route_group.title: Capability routing for {name}
route_group.description: Automatic is recommended. Select a specific native entity only when one integration is more reliable for that capability.

clear_routes.title: Clear all capability routes
clear_routes.description: Every controller will return to automatic source selection.

choose_app.title: Choose an application
choose_app.description: Select an automatically discovered, learned, or registered application.

edit_app.title: Application preferences
edit_app.description: Rename, hide, favourite, or reorder this application. Clear all custom values to return to automatic behaviour.

clear_app_preferences.title: Clear all app preferences
clear_app_preferences.description: Restore automatic names, visibility, favourites, and ordering.

timing_group.title: Command timing
timing_group.description: Increase delays only when the television is slow to leave Cast, confirm an app, or restart.

wol_group.title: Wake-on-LAN
wol_group.description: Used only when no native power-on capability is available. Clear the MAC address to disable it.

activity_group.title: Activity preset
activity_group.description: An activity powers on the device and can select an app/input, set volume, and set mute. Reusing a name replaces the existing activity.

error.two_entities_required: Select at least two different native source entities.

abort.group_not_found: The selected physical device is no longer available.

group_members_missing.title: Source entities are missing from {name}
group_members_missing.description: The explicit physical-device group {name} has {count} missing source entities. Open the integration configuration and recreate or remove the group.

route_source_missing.title: Capability routes are stale for {name}
route_source_missing.description: The following routed capabilities reference source entities that no longer exist: {capabilities}. Open the integration configuration and return them to Automatic or select replacement entities.
